case.title: AMERICAN LEGION POST NO. 51 v. PENNSYLVANIA

opinion.h: AMERICAN LEGION POST NO. 51 v. PENNSYLVANIA, 363 U.S. 720 (1960)
AMERICAN LEGION POST NO. 51 v. PENNSYLVANIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 881. Decided June 20, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a properly presented substantial federal question.
Anne X. Alpern, Attorney General of Pennsylvania, and Frank P. Lawley, Jr., Deputy Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a properly presented substantial federal question.
